  "judge_id": "Judge-001",

  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies the novelty of the work by comparing it to several prior works in the field and articulates the delta. However, it fails to map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent does not engage with citation-level scholarship.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim by providing a summary and suggesting revisions.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Output blends sources without traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies the novelty of the work by comparing it to several prior works in the field and articulates the delta. However, it fails to map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent does not engage with citation-level scholarship.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim by providing a summary and suggesting revisions.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
